title: bridge-jmap: SSRF guard on apiUrl origin is correct — defended against simplification
description: bridge-jmap/src/jmap.rs init_session: checks that api_url.origin() == session_url.origin(). This prevents a malicious JMAP server from redirecting API calls to an internal host (AWS metadata, localhost). The test proves it against concrete SSRF targets. A contributor might suggest 'just check that apiUrl starts with the session URL' — the origin check is stricter and correct: same scheme, host, and port, regardless of path.
